name: tileguy
dialogue: You can always set certain tiles to be blockers on the map specific image export.
This map uses TemplateMap_water.json as a sidecar file.
This isn't automatic and you will need to ask claude to set it up.
in this example we are just blocking the water tile but we could also select the shore tiles as blockers.
Barker uses a tool called Layout Manager to single out water tiles.
